sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n78339" key="parallaktiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παραλλ-ακτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n78339.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">for determining parallax</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὄργανον</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ptol.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Alm.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.12</biblScope></bibl></cit>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg002:4:49" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Hyp.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.49</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
